\cventry{Teaching Assistant}{Foundations of Machine Learning}{January 2022 -- May 2023}
  {Northgate University of Technology}{Millbrook, OH}{%
  \item Assisted professor with course instruction for a cohort of 120 graduate students
  \item Hosted weekly office hours and review sessions in preparation for exams and assignments
  \item Graded homeworks, exams, and programming projects covering supervised and unsupervised learning
}%
